meaning: Ha Meem (special letters at chapter start)
of Allah (owner of ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ - the Mighty, the Knowing)
of the wrong action (object of غَافِرِ)
except (excluding what comes after it from هُوَ)
he argues/disputes (with ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ - the signs of Allah)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
before them (referring to the people who denied the truth)
after them (referring to the previous nations mentioned in قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَٱلْأَحْزَابُ)
and she intended strongly (subject of لِيَأْخُذُوهُ)
so that they may seize him (object of هَمَّتْ/intended)
and they argued back and forth with someone
with the false thing (used to argue against الْحَقَّ)
so that they may cause (the truth) to slip away
with it (referring to الْحَقَّ - the truth)
the truth (which they try to reject)
she/it became proven true (referring to كَلِمَتُ)
that they (emphasizes they are أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ)
companions (as the doers/subjects of the sentence)
around him (referring to العرش - the throne)
they glorify intensively (referring to those who carry the throne)
their Lord (the one being glorified with بِحَمْدِ)
and they believe/trust (in what was mentioned before)
in/with/by him (referring to Allah, acted on by يُؤْمِنُونَ - they believe)
and they seek forgiveness (connected to يُسَبِّحُونَ - they glorify)
for those who (who are being forgiven in فَٱغْفِرْ)
you became vast/encompassing (describing Allah's mercy and knowledge)
every, all (describing وَسِعْتَ - You have encompassed)
and knowledge (object of وَسِعْتَ - You encompassed)
so forgive! (command in response to previous statement)
punishment (object of قِهِمْ - protect them from)
of the intensely burning place (possessed by عَذَابَ/punishment)
and make them enter! (connected to رَبَّنَا)
you (masculine singular, being described by الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ)
the bad deeds (object of protect from)
and that (refers to the reward mentioned in previous ayah)
the success (subject of هُوَ - it is)
they are being called out to
than (comparing Allah's hatred to their self-hatred)
when (referring to تُدْعَوْنَ - you were called)
two (feminine, being acted upon, in genitive case)
so we confessed (in response to قَالُوا)
so is there? (connected to فَٱعْتَرَفْنَا - we have admitted)
any path/way (being acted upon by مِن)
because it/he (connects to كَفَرْتُمْ - you disbelieved)
when (followed by دُعِىَ - was called upon)
Him alone (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and if (introduces another condition after كَفَرْتُمْ - you disbelieved)
something is joined (as a partner with Allah)
so/then the judgment (connected to لِلَّهِ - belongs to Allah)
the Great (One) (describing Allah, connected to العَلِىِّ)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The one who (connects to يُرِيكُمْ - shows you)
His signs or miracles (acted on by يُرِيكُمْ)
for you all (receiving provision from السَّمَآءِ)
a provision (object of يُنَزِّلُ - He sends down)
and not (connects to يُرِيكُمْ - shows you)
of the ranks/levels (possessed by رَفِيعُ - The Exalted)
the spirit (object of يُلْقِى - He casts/sends down)
from (connects أَمْرِهِۦ 'His command' to what comes after)
upon (referring to يُلْقِى - he casts/sends down)
so that he may warn (purpose of يُلْقِى - he sends down)
those who are emerging/appearing (subject of هم)
from them (referring to those who are exposed/visible in this verse)
the day (object of time when بٰرِزُونَ/emerging happens)
she/it is repaid (subject of كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ)
she earned (referring to نَفْسٍۭ - a soul)
unfairness (object of لا in لا ظُلْمَ)
Allah (as the object being described as swift in reckoning)
the day (object of أَنذِرْهُمْ - warn them)
the hearts (subject of being at the throats)
at, near, in the presence of (of ٱلْحَنَاجِرِ)
those who are holding back (emotions/anger) (describes القلوب/hearts)
the eyes (object of يَعْلَمُ - he knows)
you/she hide(s) (what ٱلصُّدُورُ - the chests contain)
And Allah (as the subject of يَقْضِى)
with anything (object of يَقْضُونَ - they judge)
indeed/certainly (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is السَّمِيعُ الْبَصِيرُ)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
The All-Hearing (divine attribute of Allah, subject of the sentence)
they travel (in فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ - on the earth)
the earth/land (after في in the ayah)
so they look/will look (connected to يَسِيرُوا۟ - they travel)
those who (referring to people in the past)
before them (referring to previous nations mentioned in ٱلَّذِينَ كَانُوا۟)
they were (referring to those who came before)
from/of them (referring to the previous nations mentioned)
strength (as the object being compared in أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً - stronger than them in strength)
and traces or marks (as object of كانوا)
in/within/inside (connects ٱلْأَرْضِ 'the earth' to يَسِيرُوا۟ 'they travel')
because of their sins (reason for فَأَخَذَهُمُ - so He seized them)
from (shows separation from قَبْلِهِمْ - before them)
their messengers (who came to them with بِٱلْبَيِّنٰتِ clear proofs)
so they rejected/denied (connected to كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ in previous ayah)
and then he seized them (subject of اللَّهُ)
and indeed certainly/definitely (introduces the statement about مُوسَىٰ)
and a clear authority (connected to بِـَٔايٰتِنَا/Our signs)
then they said (to فِرْعَوْنَ وَهٰمٰنَ وَقٰرُونَ)
a magician (one of the things they called Musa)
someone who often tells untruths (describing فِرْعَوْنَ - Pharaoh)
Then when (connects to جَآءَهُم - 'he came to them')
with us (in the context of جَآءَهُم - when he came to them)
they said (referring to the disbelievers speaking about the believers)
sons (as the object being killed in قَالُوا۟ ٱقْتُلُوٓا۟)
those who (describing the believers mentioned in ءَامَنُوا۟)
with him (referring to the one who came with the truth)
a state of being lost/misguided (after في/in)
leave me! (command from Pharaoh to his people)
let me kill (in the context of Pharaoh saying 'let me kill Moses')
Moses (the prophet who Pharaoh is speaking about)
his Lord (object of وَلْيَدْعُ/let him call)
that he changes/replaces (connected to أَخَافُ/I fear)
or (connecting أَن يُبَدِّلَ and أَن يُظْهِرَ)
he makes appear (object of أَخَافُ/I fear)
in the earth (location where فِى happens)
the corruption (object of يُظْهِرَ - to show/manifest)
indeed I (subject of عُذْتُ - I seek refuge)
by my Lord (who Musa is seeking protection from)
and your (plural) lord (connected to بِرَبِّى - 'by my Lord' in previous ayah)
any arrogant person (describing someone Musa sought protection from)
and he said (connecting to previous ayah)
a believing person (describing the man رَجُلٌ mentioned before)
Do you all kill/slay? (questioning the act of killing someone mentioned in رَجُلًا)
a man (object of أَتَقْتُلُونَ - will you kill)
so he came to you all
then upon him (referring to كَذِبُهُ - his lie)
his lie (which is the subject of فَعَلَيْهِ - then upon him)
he hits/affects you all (in the condition وَإِن يَكُ صَادِقًا - and if he is truthful)
some/part (subject of يُصِبْكُم - will strike you)
he promises you all (object of يَعِدُ)
Allah (as the object of يَقُولَ - he says)
he (referring to the person who is مُسْرِفٌ كَذَّابٌ)
the dominion (subject of لَكُمُ - belongs to you)
if (introduces a condition in إِن جَآءَنَا - if it comes to us)
what/that which (object of أُرِيكُمْ - I show you)
I show you all (in response to فِرْعَوْنُ)
except (what follows أُرِيكُمْ - I show you)
the path (being guided to by أَهْدِيكُمْ)
the right guidance (possessed by/connected to something)
and he said (introducing what the believer said to his people)
he believed (subject of قَالَ - he said)
O my people! (addressing the speaker's community)
I fear (the speaker in this ayah is the believing man)
day (possessed by what comes after it)
Noah's (like the way of Noah's people)
and Aad (name of ancient tribe, mentioned after قَوْمِ نُوحٍ)
And O my people (who is speaking to إِنِّىٓ)
upon you all (referring to the people being warned in this ayah)
on the day (when تُوَلُّونَ you will turn away)
turning their backs (describes the state of the people in يَوْمَ تُوَلُّونَ - the Day when you turn away)
for him (connected to مِنْ هَادٍ - any guide)
you all continued (to be in doubt)
Allah (the subject of يُضِلُّ - leads astray)
one who goes beyond proper bounds (describes مَنْ هُوَ - whoever is)
they argue back and forth (with others) (subject of ٱلَّذِينَ)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes before)
intense hatred (object of كَبُرَ - it became great)
those who (subject of يُجٰدِلُونَ - they dispute)
he seals (subject of Allah in this ayah)
upon, on, over (preposition connecting to قَلْبِ)
heart (possessed by مُتَكَبِّرٍ - an arrogant one)
O Haman! (being directly addressed by Pharaoh)
for me (connected to أَبْلُغُ - I may reach)
the means, the ways (object of أَبْلُغُ - I may reach)
so that I may look closely (at إِلٰهِ مُوسَىٰ)
Moses (the prophet mentioned in إِلٰهِ مُوسَىٰ)
a liar (object of أَظُنُّهُ - I think him)
evil (subject of زُيِّنَ - was made attractive)
and was forcefully blocked/prevented (from the path mentioned after)
from/away from (connects to السَّبِيلِ - the path)
from/of the path (object of عَنِ meaning 'away from')
Pharaoh (object of زُيِّنَ - was made attractive to)
and he said (introducing what the believer said to his people)
the one who (connects to ءَامَنَ - the one who believed)
O my people! (being called by the believer)
I guide you all (object of أَهْدِكُمْ in اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ)
the life (subject of this part of the ayah)
a temporary enjoyment (subject of this ayah)
and indeed (connects this emphatic statement to the previous one)
a bad deed (object of عَمِلَ - did)
then not (negates يُجْزَىٰٓ - will be recompensed)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
a righteous deed (object of عَمِلَ - did/performed)
a male (being acted upon in this ayah)
a believer (describing someone in the ayah)
so/then those (who do good deeds) (subject of يَدْخُلُونَ)
And O my people! (speaking before أَدْعُوكُمْ - I call you)
what (asking about the reason for أَدْعُوكُمْ)
I call/invite you all (object of verb)
and you all call me (while calling you to النَّجَوٰةِ/salvation)
so that I reject/deny (connected to تَدْعُونَنِى)
by/with Allah (object of أَكْفُرَ - to disbelieve)
and was made to associate partners (object of تَدْعُونَنِى/you call me to)
for me/to me (connected to تَدْعُونَنِى - you call me)
I call/invite you all (object of أَدْعُو)
The Most Forgiving (as the object after إِلَى)
it became decisively established (used with لا to mean 'undoubtedly')
that which, indeed what (connects to تَدْعُونَنِىٓ - you call me to)
in (connects فِى الدُّنْيَا with لَيْسَ لَهُۥ دَعْوَةٌ)
of the fire (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - companions/people)
I say (to لَكُمْ - to you all)
and I completely hand over (connected to فَسَتَذْكُرُونَ - you will remember)
and He protected him (object is the believer mentioned earlier)
that which (connects to مَكَرُوا - they plotted)
and surrounded/overtook completely (connected to فَوَقَىٰهُ - so He protected him)
Pharaoh (as the object being affected by حَاقَ - surrounded)
they are being presented (to النَّارُ - the Fire)
upon it/her (referring to النَّارُ - the Fire)
in the early morning (describing when they are presented to the fire)
and in the evening (paired with غُدُوًّا meaning morning)
make (all of you) enter! (command to group)
of the punishment (describing أَشَدَّ - the severest)
and when (referring to when the people argue in the Fire)
they are arguing with each other (in النَّارِ)
and then he says (after the arguing mentioned in وَإِذْ يَتَحَآجُّونَ)
to those who (who are addressed by ٱلضُّعَفٰٓؤُا۟)
for you all (being addressed by الضُّعَفٰٓؤُا۟)
so is/are (question to disbelievers in ٱلنَّارِ)
ones who definitely/surely free from need
away from us (object of مُّغْنُونَ - those who can help)
the intense fire (possessed by/connected to something)
those who (plural, subject of قَالَ - said)
indeed we (speaking to those who were arrogant)
and he said (to خَزَنَةِ جَهَنَّمَ - the keepers of Hell)
of the intense fire (possessed by جَهَنَّمَ/Hell)
Hell (the object being addressed in this ayah)
all of you call! (command to a group)
from us (addressing خَزَنَةِ جَهَنَّمَ - the keepers of Hell)
And did not...? (asking about something that didn't happen)
you are/she is (in a conditional statement)
they said (the keepers of Hell responding to those in Hell)
they spoke/said (the keepers of Hell responding to those in Hell)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
in a state of being lost (in this ayah, describes the state of the disbelievers)
indeed we (subject of لَنَنصُرُ/we will surely help)
surely we will help (promise to اللَّهِ's messengers)
they believed (connected to الَّذِينَ - those who)
in/within/during (of ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا - the worldly life)
the worldly life (in ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا - the worldly life)
he stands/rises (in the Day of Judgment)
he benefits/helps (subject of لَا - does not)
their excuse (referring to the wrongdoers mentioned as ٱلظَّالِمِينَ)
evil (subject of this part of the ayah)
Moses (the prophet who received the Torah)
and we made (someone) inherit (connected to ءَاتَيْنَا - we gave)
and a reminder (paired with هُدًى/guidance for لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبٰبِ/those of understanding)
for those who have (connected to ذِكْرَىٰ - a reminder)
of the minds/intellects (possessed by أُو۟لِى - people of)
so be patient! (connected to وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ - Allah's promise is true)
a truth/reality (subject of إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ)
and seek forgiveness! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
in the evening (paired with وَٱلْإِبْكٰرِ - and the early morning)
and the early morning (in relation to العَشِىِّ)
they argue back and forth (with someone)
there is not (in صُدُورِهِمْ - their chests)
their chests/breasts (that contain what they feel)
except/only (excluding كِبْرٌ from what's in their hearts)
pride (subject of what is in their hearts)
indeed he/it (connected to هُوَ which comes after)
He (referring to Allah as the All-Hearer in this ayah)
the heavens (possessed by/connected to something after it)
and the earth (object of comparison with السماوات)
and yet/however (connecting to خَلْقُ while contrasting with أَكْثَرَ)
the blind one (contrasted with ٱلْبَصِيرُ/the seeing one)
and the one who sees clearly/is insightful
and they did/performed (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)
the good/righteous ones (feminine plural) (object of عَمِلُوا)
and not (connects to previous statement about those who believe)
the one who does evil (subject of يَسْتَوِى)
little (describes how much تَتَذَكَّرُونَ you remember)
indeed/verily (emphasizing what follows: 'the Hour is coming')
in it/her (referring to ٱلسَّاعَةَ - the Hour)
your Lord (as the subject of قَالَ)
Hell (as the destination in سَيَدْخُلُونَ - they will enter)
those who are humbled (describing those who will enter جَهَنَّمَ)
in order that you all rest (referring to all people, as mentioned in ٱلنَّاسِ)
in it (referring to الَّيْلَ - the night)
Allah (as the object being referred to in this verse)
the people (who receive فَضْلٍ/favor from اللَّهَ)
they are grateful (referring to most people in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
that (pointing to something far and addressing multiple people)
your Lord (referring to Allah as the complete caretaker of all of you)
god, deity (object of لَّآ - 'there is no')
he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)
so how? (expressing surprise at being deluded away from truth)
you (all) are being turned away (from the truth)
they deny/reject (referring to those who denied Allah's signs)
he made (for لَكُمُ - for you all)
a place of settling (object of جَعَلَ)
as a building (describing how Allah made the sky)
and he shaped/designed you all carefully
and then He made beautiful (referring to صُوَرَكُمْ - your forms)
your forms/shapes (referring to how Allah shaped all of you)
and He provided you all (with sustenance)
of the good, pure things (provided by Allah)
your Lord (referring to Allah as the one who nurtures you all)
So He is supremely exalted (connected to previous ayah listing Allah's blessings)
He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
The Ever-Living One (Divine attribute of هُوَ)
except (excludes what follows from لَآ إِلٰهَ 'there is no god')
he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
those who make (something) pure/sincere (object of فَٱدْعُوهُ)
the religion/way of life (as object of مُخْلِصِينَ)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
indeed I (subject of نُهِيتُ - I was forbidden)
I was prevented/forbidden (subject of أَنْ أَعْبُدَ - that I worship)
I worship (after أَنْ in the ayah)
those who/which (referring to the false gods that are worshipped)
you (all) call/invite (those you worship besides Allah)
when (followed by جَآءَنِىَ - came to me)
And I was commanded (connected to نُهِيتُ - I was forbidden)
The one who/which - connects descriptions to what's being described
from (showing what خَلَقَكُم/He created you is made from)
then (connects the stages of human creation in sequence)
from a drop of fluid (after مِن)
then, thereafter (connects ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٍ with مِن نُّطْفَةٍ)
from (showing that عَلَقَةٍ 'a clinging substance' comes after this stage)
then/next (showing sequence with مِن نُّطْفَةٍ coming after تُرَابٍ)
a child (being brought forth by يُخْرِجُكُمْ)
then (connects events in this ayah about stages of human creation)
so that you all may reach (أَشُدَّكُمْ - your maturity)
then (connects this stage of creation to the previous stage)
so that you all may become (purpose of خَلَقَكُم - He created you)
and from you all (connected to مَّن يُتَوَفَّىٰ - who dies)
whoever (subject of يُتَوَفَّىٰ - is caused to die)
from (shows تُرَابٍ 'dust' is the starting point)
an appointed time (object of لِتَبْلُغُوا/that you may reach)
and so that you may (connected to تَعْقِلُونَ - you use reason)
you all use reason (addressing the audience of the Quran)
He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
and he causes to die (connected to يُحْىِۦ - he gives life)
then only/just (connects to يَقُولُ - he says)
and so it becomes (result of كُن - 'Be!')
have you not? (addressing the Prophet ﷺ)
you see/consider (in أَلَمْ تَرَ - have you not seen/considered)
to, towards (connecting to الَّذِينَ - those who)
they strongly denied/rejected (the Book and what We sent Our messengers with)
with/by the book (object of كَذَّبُوا - they denied)
our messengers (object of كَذَّبُوا - they denied)
they know (referring to those who denied)
the chains, the shackles (subject of يُسْحَبُونَ)
their necks (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the surah)
in (something is inside ٱلْحَمِيمِ 'the scalding water')
the boiling water (that will be used to punish the disbelievers)
then (connecting فِى ٱلْحَمِيمِ with فِى ٱلنَّارِ)
they are being burned/heated (in النَّارِ - the Fire)
then (connecting what follows to what came before)
to/for them (object of قِيلَ - it was said)
where (asking about false deities in تُشْرِكُونَ)
you (all) were (asking about what you used to worship)
from (connects دُونِ to what comes before it)
they said (followed by ضَلُّوا۟ - they went astray)
rather/but rather (contradicting what was said before about ضَلُّوا۟)
we certainly used to call/invite/pray to
like that, similarly (pointing to what was mentioned before about those who were worshipped besides Allah being lost)
the disbelievers (being led astray by Allah)
that is for you all (addressing multiple people)
because of what (connects to تَفْرَحُونَ - you rejoice)
you (all) rejoice (because of what you used to do)
the earth (being acted upon by فِى)
and because of what (connects to تَفْرَحُونَ - you rejoice)
you all were (referring to those who rejoiced wrongfully)
you all are being excessively joyful (because of your wrongful joy on earth)
ones lasting forever (describes those entering the gates)
and how evil/bad (is the destination of the arrogant)
dwelling place (of الْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ - the arrogant ones)
then if/and if (connects to previous command فَٱصْبِرْ)
we will surely show you (object of نَعِدُ 'we promise')
we will surely take your soul (cause you to die)
from them (referring to the messengers mentioned in قَبْلِكَ)
we narrated/told in detail (to عَلَيْكَ - to you)
upon you (object of نَقْصُصْ - we narrate)
upon you (connected to قَصَصْنَا - we narrated)
and what (connects to لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا - indeed We sent)
except (connects to يَأْتِىَ - meaning no messenger could come with a sign except...)
then when (connects to previous ayah and introduces جَآءَ 'came')
it was decided/settled (by أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ - the command of Allah)
with/by the truth (describes how قُضِىَ/it was judged was done)
The One who (connects to جَعَلَ - made/placed)
he made (for لَكُمُ - for you all)
for you all (recipients of جَعَلَ - made)
so that you (all) may ride (purpose of جَعَلَ/made)
from it/her (referring to الْأَنْعٰمَ - the cattle)
and from it/her (referring to الْأَنْعٰمَ - the cattle)
and in order that you (plural) reach
upon it/her (referring to the benefits mentioned)
and he shows you all (His signs)
you all deny (referring to multiple people being addressed)
And did they not (before يَسِيرُوا۟ - travel)
so they look carefully (connected to يَسِيرُوا۟ - they travel)
and more intense/stronger (than them in strength)
it availed (عَنْهُم what they used to earn)
away from them (referring to what they earned)
what (object of يَكْسِبُونَ - they used to earn)
Then when (followed by جَآءَتْهُمْ - came to them)
with the clear proofs (that the messengers came with)
they became joyful (with emphasis on the group)
with what (that they had of عِندَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ - knowledge they possessed)
with them (referring to رُسُلُهُم - their messengers)
with him/it (referring to their knowledge/science they had)
Then when (followed by رَأَوْا۟ - they saw)
our might (object of رَأَوْا - they saw)
they said (subject of ءَامَنَّا - they believed)
those who make partners (with Allah) (object of كُنَّا - we were)
and then not (in past) (connects to يَكُ)
he benefits them (subject of لَمْ يَكُ)
they saw (when they saw بَأْسَنَا our punishment)
our might/punishment (object of رَأَوْا - they saw)
she passed by (describing سُنَّتَ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's way)
and he lost (connected to رَأَوْا۟ - they saw)
there/at that place or time (in this context: at that moment when they saw Our punishment)
